result.title: Introducing GPT-5.5 with NVIDIA
result.description:
"GPT-5.5’s superpower is that it can just get things done.”

It’s so cool to see how masters of the AI universe like NVIDIA’s Dennis Hannusch are leveraging GPT-5.5-Codex for complex engineering tasks.

Be like Dennis. 

Build with GPT-5.5: https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-5/

result.title: First impressions of GPT-5.5 from Aaron Friel
result.description: Romain Huet chats with Aaron Friel, Member of Technical Staff @ OpenAI about the new GPT-5.5 model. Find out how teams within OpenAI are taking advantage of faster and more autonomous long-running tasks using GPT-5.5.

result.title: First impressions of GPT-5.5 from Claire Vo
result.description: Find out what Claire Vo, founder of ChatPRD and host of How I AI, thinks about GPT-5.5. Claire talks about squashing bugs in ChatPRD and how GPT-5.5 is enabling new workflows.

result.title: First impressions of GPT-5.5 from Will Koh
result.description: Romain Huet chats with Will Koh from Ramp. Will is a Senior Software Engineer who has been working with GPT-5.5. Find out how GPT-5.5 improves Ramp's harness through much more intelligent tool finding and how this will benefit their customers.

result.title: First impressions of GPT-5.5
result.description: Will Koh, Claire Voh, and Aaron Friel share their first impressions of GPT-5.5
